'''lafushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dykes|dykes]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dykes|dykes]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lafushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læfishith|læfishith]] || [[word:læfishij|læfishij]] || [[word:læfishish|læfishish]] || [[word:læfishi|læfishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lafufushuth|lafufushuth]] || [[word:lafufushuj|lafufushuj]] || [[word:lafufushush|lafufushush]] || [[word:lafufushu|lafufushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lafushuth|lafushuth]] || [[word:lafushuj|lafushuj]] || [[word:lafushush|lafushush]] || [[word:lafushu|lafushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lafufshuth|lafufshuth]] || [[word:lafufshuj|lafufshuj]] || [[word:lafufshush|lafufshush]] || [[word:lafufshuf|lafufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lafushuthu|lafushuthu]] || [[word:lafushuju|lafushuju]] || [[word:lafushushu|lafushushu]] || [[word:lafushuku|lafushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lafushuth|lafushuth]] || [[word:lafushuj|lafushuj]] || [[word:lafushush|lafushush]] || [[word:lafushu|lafushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lafushuthul|lafushuthul]] || [[word:lafushujul|lafushujul]] || [[word:lafushushul|lafushushul]] || [[word:lafushukul|lafushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lafushuthuthu|lafushuthuthu]] || [[word:lafushujuju|lafushujuju]] || [[word:lafushushushu|lafushushushu]] || [[word:lafushuku|lafushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lafushuthun|lafushuthun]] || [[word:lafushujun|lafushujun]] || [[word:lafushushun|lafushushun]] || [[word:lafushukun|lafushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lafushuthuoro|lafushuthuoro]] || [[word:lafushujuoro|lafushujuoro]] || [[word:lafushushuoro|lafushushuoro]] || [[word:lafushukuoro|lafushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
